title: Tom Pursglove - Minister of State for Legal Migration and the Border, the Home Office  - advice under the government's Business Appointment Rules
body: "Independent consultancy and commissions  Mr Pursglove received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on taking up a commission with HSEnergy Group Ltd, under his independent consultancy Ascalane Partners Ltd. The advice was provided in November 2025 and the appointment was announced later that month.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Tom Pursglove before its closure. "
